integration_notes: Sidebar component now uses dark color scheme (#1F2937 background) while maintaining all existing functionality
Text and UI elements use light colors (#F9FAFB, #D1D5DB) for proper contrast against dark background
Active menu items highlighted with blue accent (rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3)) and lighter blue text (#60A5FA)
Hover states adjusted to use light overlays (rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)) for better visibility on dark background
Toggle button uses light border and background with increased opacity on hover
No changes required to DashboardLayout or other components - sidebar styling is self-contained
All existing props, state management, and navigation logic remain unchanged
